name: rack10
description: 10-inch LabRax mini-rack mechanical reference (v1: LabRax geometry only): 1U pitch, hole center-to-center span, usable/panel widths, per-U hole pattern, device height/stacking gap. No governing standard exists for 10in racks; all values corroborated across the designer's own article and an independent to-scale diagram.
sources: https://www.printables.com/model/1499547-8-bay-10-inch-3u-serverrack-mount-for-3-5-hdd-lab-rax — third-party remix, [C] backs mounting depth 240mm //VERIFY (unaffiliated, not designer-stated)
ISO 273 (metric clearance holes, close fit) — named standard, not fetched; backs M6 screw clearance, repo hardware/rack19 precedent
ANSI B18.2 (machine-screw close-fit clearance drill) — named standard, not fetched; backs #10-32 screw clearance //VERIFY, repo rack19 precedent
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cage_nut — repo rack19 precedent; cage-nut square hole size, not used by LabRax, carried for future vendors

rack19's own RESEARCH.md (Wikipedia Rack_unit + Micropolis rack-mounting FAQ) — [C] //VERIFY, device height/stacking gap (0.79mm) borrowed by analogy, not re-fetched this pass; no 10in-specific source exists
